mapper.select: SELECT 'annualOhsInternalAuditPlan' AS title ,'/AnnualOhsInternalAuditPlan' AS route ,'annualOhsInternalAuditPlanDesc' AS description , case when annualOhsInternalAuditPlan.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t2 ON t2.target_type = 'AAP' AND t2.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.comp_id AND t2.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t3 ON t3.target_type = 'AAP' AND t3.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.comp_id AND t3.param = 'reviewer' WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} AND t1.use_yn = 'Y' AND t2.signature is not null AND t3.signature is not null AND t1.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS annualOhsInternalAuditPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'ohsInternalAuditExecutionPlan' AS title ,'/OhsInternalAuditExecutionPlan' AS route ,'ohsInternalAuditExecutionPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN ohsInternalAuditExecutionPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_audit_execution_plan t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t2 ON t2.target_type = 'AXP' AND t2.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no AND t2.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t3 ON t3.target_type = 'AXP' AND t3.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no AND t3.param = 'reviewer' WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} AND t1.use_yn = 'Y' AND t2.signature is not null AND t3.signature is not null AND t1.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS ohsInternalAuditExecutionPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'ohsInternalAuditResultsReport' AS title ,'/OhsInternalAuditResultsReport' AS route ,'ohsInternalAuditResultsReportDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN ohsInternalAuditResultsReport.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_audit_execution_plan t1 left join esg.tb_audit_result_report t4 ON t4.write_year = t1.write_year and t4.doc_no = t1.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t2 ON t2.target_type = 'ARR' AND t2.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no||t4.doc_seq AND t2.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info t3 ON t3.target_type = 'ARR' AND t3.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no||t4.doc_seq AND t3.param = 'reviewer' WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} AND t1.use_yn = 'Y' AND t2.signature is not null AND t3.signature is not null AND t1.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS ohsInternalAuditResultsReport UNION ALL SELECT 'ohsCorrectiveActionRequest' AS title ,'/OhsCorrectiveActionRequest' AS route ,'ohsCorrectiveActionRequestDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN OhsCorrectiveActionRequest.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request t1 WHERE t1.comp_id = #{compId} AND t1.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS OhsCorrectiveActionRequest
